text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Hey! This is top secret info, but I just found out
about something called "sand training"!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
If you build a really big sandcastle at the beach,
it makes both your mind and body super strong!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
I read it in a ninja manga! You should read it too,
Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Following her passionate speech, Haru Urara
drags me to the beach.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: All right! Time to build a ginormous sandcastle!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
I hope you're excited for this, Trainer! This sand
training's gonna be so good for building up
strength!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
The main character of the comic was so strong,
they could even break unbreakable rocks!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Setting aside my belief in sand training's
effectiveness, this seems to be a nice change of
pace, so I decide to play along until she's
satisfied.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant... Sand is... way heavier than... I thought!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
My feet keep sinking in! It's so hard to walk... The
training must be working! It's just like the manga!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
All right! We've gotta pull out all the stops and
make a big one! Let's do this, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Huh?! Well, yeah, of course! Don't you wanna get
stronger too?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's hard work, but our efforts pay off in the form
of the large sandcastle standing before us.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: It looks great! But I wanna make it even better!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Hey, Trainer! What should we do now?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Good idea! Let's make it the prettiest sandcastle
ever!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
What to pick, what to pick? I wanna put a
whooole bunch of things on it and make it really
pop!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, I'm so hyped! I'm gonna go get loads of
shells!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Before long, the castle is covered in seashells and
coral.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Oh, look! The shells are like armor! It's so strong!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We continue our "sand training" all the way until
sunset.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The next day...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
I did sand training yesterday and made a super
strong sandcastle!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Hm, I don't quite follow... So your training made
your sandcastle stronger? Not you?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Exactly!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Wait... What?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In the end, it seems the sand training only taught
Haru Urara how to strengthen sandcastles... not
herself.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, you're right! The one in the manga was
waaay bigger!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: We need lots and lots of sand. We gotta make this thing out-of-this-world HUGE!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: All right! I'll go get us more sand!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Wow! It's so biiig! Hehe! We did it, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A massive sandcastle looms over us, and Haru
Urara looks extremely satisfied with the results of
her sand training.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The next day...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Trainer! Have you heard of "waterfall
training"?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With those words, I accompany a very excited
Haru Urara to a river. The day ends up being
quite relaxing despite the trials I faced.
